title: VideoIntroBrief
description: Single source of truth for an intro/motivator video. Consumed by the code renderer (Remotion primitives). Audio is authoritative for total duration; beats are allocated against the measured TTS timeline.

version.description: Brief schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

lesson_ref.description: Identifies which Athena lesson this brief is for.

is_custom.description: True if this came from my-learning custom_topics

topic.description: Human-readable topic name, e.g. 'Linear equations with one variable'.

concept.description: What the video is actually teaching.

math_concept.description: The mathematical idea (e.g. 'slope as rise over run').

real_world_analog.description: The concrete narrative anchor (e.g. 'two hiking trails up mountains of different steepness').

style_strategy.description: How tightly the visuals hew to the math. Metaphorical = real-world only; literal = graph/equation only; mixed = open with metaphor, transition to literal.

style.description: Visual style controls. The aesthetic is locked at the system level (white linework on black); per-video choices live here.

background_motif.description: Which environmental motif to use. wireframe_terrain = ex1/ex2 mountains, starfield = ex3 coin-in-space.

anchor_objects.description: Named visual anchors referenced by beats via `anchor_id` (e.g. a coin, a hiker figure).

narration.description: The script + measured TTS timeline. Audio is authoritative for total duration.

script.description: Full narration as plain prose. TTS consumes this.

audio_duration_s.description: Filled in after TTS. Drives beat duration allocation.

word_timings.description: Word-level timestamps from ElevenLabs character timestamps or Whisper alignment.

beats.description: Ordered visual beats. Each consumes a contiguous slice of the audio timeline.

narration_span.description: The slice of narration this beat covers (for QA + caption sync).

visual.description: Renderer-agnostic description of what should be on screen.

primary.description: Plain-English description of the dominant visual element.

renderer_hint.description: Guidance for the code renderer. Falls back to 'primary' if 'code' is absent.

props.description: Component-specific props. E.g. for animated_line: slope, intercept, color, draw_in_ms.

anchor_id.description: Reference to a style.anchor_objects entry if this beat needs a photo-real object overlaid.

overlays.description: Text/math/labels rendered on top of the visual by Remotion. Never generated by the video model.

content.description: Plain text for captions/labels; LaTeX for math.

appear_s.description: When to fade in, relative to beat start

disappear_s.description: When to fade out, relative to beat start. Omit for 'stay until beat end'

qa_constraints.description: Acceptance gates for the rendered MP4.

max_dead_frame_seconds.description: Max contiguous seconds where mean brightness < threshold while audio is active. Hard fail above this. Ex2 had ~14s, Ex3 had ~20s — we target 0.

dead_frame_brightness_threshold.description: 0-255 mean brightness below which a frame counts as 'dead'.
